brief: Extend brix.math.sign (src/sign.brix only — do not touch other domain modules). Add Float sign and Int/Float step helpers that compile today: `fn sign(x: Float) -> Float = if x < 0.0 then -1.0 else if x > 0.0 then 1.0 else 0.0`, `fn step(edge: Float, x: Float) -> Float = if x < edge then 0.0 else 1.0`, `fn step(edge: Int, x: Int) -> Int = if x < edge then 0 else 1`, `fn copySign(mag: Float, sign_src: Float) -> Float = if sign_src < 0.0 then -abs(mag) else abs(mag)`, `fn copySign(mag: Int, sign_src: Int) -> Int = if sign_src < 0 then -abs(mag) else abs(mag)`. Reuse existing `abs` in the same module. Do not invent `%`, `let`, Decimal, or units. Exact `fn`/`=` syntax, typed overloads, preserve existing decls. Host formats after check.
